name: Push-Up
instructions: Keep core tight and lower chest under control.

name: Back Squat
instructions: Brace trunk and keep knees tracking toes.

name: Bent Over Row
instructions: Hinge at hips and pull bar toward lower ribs.

name: Deadlift
instructions: Maintain neutral spine and push floor away.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Stack ribcage over pelvis and press overhead.
